creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  - Update to 2.2.64,1
  - Pet portlint

Modified:

Modified: head/www/pmwiki/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/pmwiki/Makefile	Mon May 19 03:37:11 2014	(r354486)
+++ head/www/pmwiki/Makefile	Mon May 19 03:37:52 2014	(r354487)
@@ -2,14 +2,14 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	pmwiki
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.48
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.64
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.pmwiki.org/pub/pmwiki/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=	miwi@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A WikiWikiWeb clone using PHP
+COMMENT=	WikiWikiWeb clone using PHP
 
 USE_PHP=	mbstring session
 WANT_PHP_WEB=	yes

==============================================================================

 scripting language. PmWiki has been primarily designed as a tool to
 support easy, collaborative authoring and maintenance of web sites.
 
-WWW: http://www.pmwiki.org/
+WWW: http://www.pmwiki.org
